steps.title: Identify the slope and intercept
steps.content: A linear function can be written in slope-intercept form, where $m$ is the slope and $b$ is the value when $x=0$.

steps.title: Write the function rule
steps.content:
The slope is $74$, so $m=74$. Also, $f(0)=5$, so the vertical intercept is $b=5$. Therefore,
$$f(x)=74x+5$$

steps.title: Choose the matching equation
steps.content: The only equation with slope $74$ and intercept $5$ is the matching choice. The answer is D.
